title: 8 Section Nibble Tray with lid - Plastic Serving Tray - Platter for Party Food - Reusable Buffet Snack Trays - Eight Compartment Nibble Serving Dishes. Set of 2.
features: PRACTICAL SERVING SOLOUTION - The clear 8 section nibble tray with lid is a versatile and practical serving solution designed to keep your snacks fresh organised and easy to access. Perfect for parties family gatherings or even everyday use this tray offers eight distinct compartments allowing you to serve a variety of snacks or appetisers without mixing them.

8 SEPARATE SECTIONS - The serving tray is divided into eight separate compartments providing ample space for different types of snacks dips or appetisers. It also features a separate central dish for adding your own choice of dip sauce or condiment. The eight outer sections allow for a visually appealing and organised display making it easy for guests to choose their favourite snack. Easily serve multiple types of snacks without worrying about flavors or textures mixing. Ideal for nuts chips fruits cheeses olives and more.

CLEAR & DURABLE - Crafted from high quality transparent plastic the tray and lid allow you and your guests to see the contents at a glance. The clear design fits seamlessly with any decor and event theme from casual family gatherings to formal parties. Guests can easily identify and select snacks without the need to constantly remove and replace the lid maintaining freshness throughout the event.

SECURE FITTED LID - The tray comes with a matching clear lid that fits securely keeping snacks fresh and protected from outside elements. The tight fitting lid ensures that snacks remain fresh and safe from dust moisture or bugs especially when used outdoors. The lid allows you to prepare snacks in advance and store them in the fridge or pantry, ready to serve when needed.

VERSATILE USE - Whether you're hosting a party indoors or enjoying a picnic outdoors the trays sturdy construction and protective lid make it suitable for any occasion. Perfect for home use picnics BBQs or outdoor events, keeping your snacks secure and fresh in any environment. The lightweight design and lid make it easy to transport snacks to different areas or locations without hassle.

SPACIOUS YET COMPACT - The eight compartments provide generous space for a variety of snacks while the overall size remains compact enough to fit on most tables or countertops. The tray offers a large serving area without taking up excessive table space making it ideal for small gatherings or crowded party tables. Keeps your serving area looking organized and professional without the need for multiple bowls or plates. Externally with the lid the tray measures L30cm W30cm x H4cm. Each compartment measures L10cm x W10cm x H3cm from the widest points approximately.
